form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming pulled up at Chepstow on January 27 over 3900m. Second-up won by 0.8 len this track on March 16 over 3900m slow track defeating El Rojo Grande carrying 75.5kg at $4 in a steeplechase. Sure to improve again. All set to make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Last run finished second of 8 runners at Hereford on March 18 over 3200m, 2.25 len behind The Brickey Ranger with 71.5kg at $6.50.
